message:
feat(extensions,rpc,tools): refine extension JS bridge, RPC protocol, and tool dispatch

Extensions JS (extensions_js.rs):
- Refine JS bridge logic with improved error handling and output
  buffering (+24/-12 lines)

Interactive (interactive.rs):
- Minor refinement (+4/-2 lines)

RPC (rpc.rs):
- Extend RPC protocol handling (+15/-7 lines)

Tools (tools.rs):
- Extend tool dispatch logic (+15/-7 lines)

Tests:
- http_client.rs: update test expectations (+2/-1 lines)

Beads tracker: sync issue state (large JSONL re-sort from concurrent
agents)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
